title: Vibrant Vegetable Paella
description: A flavorful and colorful paella dish loaded with vibrant vegetables, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add sliced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add vibrant and smoked paprika, stir to combine.
Add diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add paella rice and stir to coat with the tomato mixture.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
